description: LogMeIn is a remote access and IT support product family now operated under GoTo. Its products include remote support, endpoint management, and remote administration tools such as LogMeIn Resolve, Central, Rescue, and Pro.
summary: For logmein.com itself, I found no public developer surfaces hosted on logmein.com subdomains; the only relevant developer-facing API documentation points to GoTo-owned surfaces on developer.goto.com and api.goto.com, notably the LogMeIn Resolve REST/GraphQL-style API authenticated with GoTo OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens.
